title: Potatomized
description: The King Of Optimization! It has all of my Mods to Increase your FPS from the Launcher's default by 3x!!
body:
**_This Mod is the King of Optimization, specifically made for all Potatoes!_**
 **Flat potato, Potato, chunky Potato, Roblox server Potato
 Onion, Flat Onion, Old Onion, etc**
(Note: the onions and potatoes are jokes for the type of hardware; Onion is considered worse)
-  This Mod Includes Top Optimization Mods like Sodium, Lithium, and More!
-  And some not well-known mods such as BadOptimizations, Entity Culling, Etc.
-  This modpack also contains some Quality of Life Mods. Don't worry, only a few
-  This Modpack is perfect for people with bad hardware specs, and so for potato and onions!
This is Perfect for anyone, Any Server, Any Friends!
Download it Today and play with almost 0 Lag
If you have More than 5 stutters at a time, Congrats On Making it this far with your hardware!
